records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Enabled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Enabling (?).]

defs: To give strength or ability to; to make firm and strong.
quotes: Receive the Holy Ghost, said Christ to his apostles, when he enabled them with priestly power.

defs: To make able (to do, or to be, something); to confer sufficient power upon; to furnish with means, opportunities, and the like; to render competent for; to empower; to endow.
quotes: Temperance gives Nature her full play, and enables her to exert herself in all her force and vigor.
